name: Mussels Dijon
recipeInstructions:
This yields 2 servings as a main course or 4 servings as a first course.
Scrub and debeard the mussels. In a large stockpot, combine green onions, garlic, shallots, pepper, wine, and mussels. Bring to boiling, cover, and steam covered for 3 - 5 minutes, or until mussels open. Using a slotted spoon, transfer mussels to a heated dish. Discard any unopened mussels. Stir mustard and cream into the remaining liquid in the kettle. Boil the mixture, stirring constantly, for 3 - 5 minutes, or until the sauce is reduced by half and thickened. Return mussels to the stockpot and add parsley. Stir to coat the mussels with the sauce. Serve with French bread to soak up the sauce.
